# interlink_projects (Data Source)

Fetches the Inter.link projects used to group services.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `projects` (Attributes List) All projects. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--projects))

<a id="nestedatt--projects"></a>
### Nested Schema for `projects`

Read-Only:

- `created_date` (String) Project creation timestamp (RFC 3339).
- `description` (String) Optional free-text project description.
- `id` (Number) Internal numeric project ID.
- `name` (String) Project name.
- `prj` (String) Project identifier (e.g. `PRJ242`).
- `status` (String) Project status.
